texto: For more than four hundred years we nurtured the belief (should that, perhaps, be faith?) that evidence-based investigation meeting scientific standards of rigor would reveal the true mechanism of nature. and yet when the mechanisms of nature were revealed to be quantum mechanisms, the worlds of science and philosophy were set on a collision course. instead of truth and comprehension, we got deeply unsettling questions about what we can ever hope to know about the world.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jim Baggott que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “For more than four hundred years we nurtured the belief (should that, perhaps, be faith?) that ev…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, physics, science, com foco em science.
